title: pedilanthus articulatus
intro: Pedilanthus articulatus, also known as the dragon's blood tree or red bloodstem, is a succulent plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like wounds and eczema due to its ability to stimulate blood flow and promote tissue repair. In herbal preparations, Pedilanthus articulatus is often used to make a tincture or salve, which can be applied topically to affected areas or taken internally in small doses to reap its medicinal benefits.
